name: acceler8-ai-landing
description: Acceler8-ai landing page - Technology selection and deployment partner for n8n ecosystem

scripts.audit: grep -r "BTF\|CDM\|BikeTourFrance\|biketourfrance\|#A3E635\|chartreuse\|neon green\|highlighter green\|Accellerate AI\|Accelerate AI\|acceler8-ai.net\|Folex\|getastrothemes\|lorem ipsum\|placeholder\|dummy\|John Doe\|example.com\|portfolio\|freelancer" src/ public/ --exclude-dir=node_modules || echo 'No forbidden strings found'
